outcome_summary: Eighth routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 08 — 27 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_08.md. Findings: C1 1/27 defective = 3.7% (E-4 computational_theory_of_mind->turing_test, Reversed — fresh authoring defect, not audit-touched; the Turing Test is the historical and pedagogical entry to CTM, not vice versa, per standard intro-philosophy-of-mind textbooks); 25 Sound, 1 Defensible (E-11 free_will->determinism, recurring 'target is the more general/foundational concept' shape from shards 05/06/07), 1 Reversed, 0 Weak-redundant. C2 0/20 fail. C3 2/20 fail = 10.0% — N-9 accessibility_relation (Kripke-semantics-framework-gated) AND N-19 phenomenal_intentionality (philosophy-of-mind-aboutness-framework-gated). Zero audit-touched edges (no shard pair matches migrations 0061-0065 forward or reverse). Running C1 across shards 01-08: 10.7% / 3.6% / 3.6% / 0.0% / 3.7% / 0.0% / 0.0% / 3.7%, firmly under the production audit's 13% baseline. The C3 jargon-gating cluster strengthens to FOUR consecutive shards (05 N-8 SDL/modal-closure, 06 N-16 credence/notation, 07 N-18 Kantian framework, 08 N-9 + N-19) of the same load-bearing-first-sentence-gated-on-undefined-framework shape; this shard produced two instances rather than one — the mechanism is reliable, not noise. The over-Defensible-drift watch item is NOT worsening (Defensible count 1, down from shard 06's 6 and shard 07's 3); the single E-11 instance shares the recurring shape but is held at Defensible on its merits. E-4 is the strongest-warranted Reversed call of the recent census run; recorded with detailed rationale so the SQA-20 closeout can disposition cleanly without re-deriving. Candidate findings only; disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-08 marked complete; SQA-09 next. No in-band Issues. mempalace_zero_citations_after_search fires because the boot search surfaced 0 drawers above the 0.60 threshold across all three formulations — the same benign shape every prior census shard saw; the evidence file and diary reference prior shards (05/06/07) and the production audit (S-0122) as named-session references rather than drawer-ID citations. 0 validator hard-fails (50 checks on --final-check).
